title: Enforce package vetting policy in CI and audit existing dependencies
description:
Implement automated enforcement of the package vetting policy (Data/Pages/policies/package-vetting.md):

1. Add a CI step that runs `dotnet list package --vulnerable` and fails the build if any vulnerabilities are found (treat warnings as errors for NU1903+).
2. Add a CI step that checks for deprecated packages (`dotnet list package --deprecated`).
3. Add a pre-commit or build-time check that verifies the About page (WebUI.Blazor/wwwroot/about.html) lists every top-level package from the solution.
4. Document the CI enforcement in the policy page.

Acceptance: CI goes red if a vulnerable/deprecated package is added or if the About page is out of sync.
councilFinding: Sprint 51 post-mortem: SQLitePCLRaw CVE was preventable with automated checks.
